prompt: Modify the neckline of the beige cable-knit sweater to a classic crew neck. The neckline must feature a perfectly circular, rounded shape that sits snugly at the base of the neck. The edge finish must be a clean, uniform ribbed trim that matches the gauge of the existing cuffs. All other elements, including the tan color, the intricate cable-knit texture, the blue embroidered logo on the chest, the overall garment silhouette, and the plain white background, must remain exactly as they are in the original image.
